purpose: Route product-development requests through strategy, PRD, and system-design stages without skipping prerequisites.
selection_order: Stage 1: strategy, MVP framing, blueprints from scratch.
Stage 2: PRDs, user stories, acceptance criteria (requires validated blueprint).
Stage 3: schemas, APIs, state flows, infrastructure (requires validated PRD).
If the request would skip a prerequisite stage, route to the prerequisite child first.

children.name: labs21-chief-architect
children.summary: Handles raw ideas, strategy, MVP definition, and from-scratch blueprints.
route_when: The user is starting from a raw idea or needs the first strategic blueprint.
avoid_when: A validated blueprint already exists and the work is PRD writing or system design.

install_if_missing.notes: Install before routing if the runtime cannot discover nested skills automatically.

children.name: labs21-prd-writer
children.summary: Turns a validated blueprint into PRDs, user stories, acceptance criteria, and edge cases.
route_when: A validated blueprint exists and the work is turning it into a PRD.
The user needs user stories, acceptance criteria, or edge-case coverage for an approved direction.
avoid_when: A validated PRD already exists and the work is system design.

install_if_missing.notes: Install before routing if the runtime cannot discover nested skills automatically.

children.name: labs21-system-architect
children.summary: Turns a validated PRD into concrete schemas, APIs, state flows, and infrastructure decisions.
route_when: A validated PRD exists and the work is system design for v1.
The user needs schema, API contract, state-flow, or infrastructure decisions.
avoid_when: The product direction is still being shaped at strategy or PRD level.

install_if_missing.notes: Install before routing if the runtime cannot discover nested skills automatically.
